# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring / code quality
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] All public content (code, comments, commit messages) is in English
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally (pure-Python suite)
- [ ] `ruff check` passes
- [ ] Translations updated (`strings.json`, `translations/en.json`, `translations/fr.json`) if user-facing strings changed
- [ ] Tested against a real ESPHome gateway (or explained why not applicable)
